imageRequirements:

existing_features.title: Add the missing static image assets under `frontend/public/assets/generated` for the photo filenames referenced by backend seeded items, using attribute-relevant visuals (matching item type/color/pattern) so search results show meaningful images.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add relevant images for each search result

Ensure every clothing item returned by backend `searchItems` has a non-empty, valid local photo path (served from `/assets/generated/...`) so that every search result can display an item-relevant image instead of the generic fallback.

Update the backend seeded `photo` filenames as needed to exactly match the generated static asset filenames (including extension and any `.dim_<WxH>` suffixes), so the Results grid reliably loads images without 404s.
